summary: A single-story rectangular bunker-like structure with a flat roof, built from stonebrick with a dark wood/nether brick trim band. The building features four evenly-spaced window openings on the visible front face, set within a stonebrick wall. The structure sits on a gravel foundation platform and is surrounded by dirt/coarse dirt landscaping.
rebuild_hints: Construct walls from stonebrick to height of 3 blocks
Place four evenly-spaced window openings (2×2 blocks each) on front face, centered vertically
Add nether_brick trim band around top perimeter of walls
Create flat roof using nether_brick or stone blocks
Surround base with gravel platform extending 1-2 blocks outward
Ensure bilateral symmetry of window placement
No visible door on front face; may be on rear or side
uncertainties: Exact interior layout and door placement unknown
Precise window dimensions and frame material uncertain (appears to be glass with stonebrick frame)
Depth dimension estimated from perspective; may vary by 1-2 blocks
Whether structure extends below ground level unclear from images
